description_long: This sconce features a geometric, angular frame constructed from dark metal, forming a protective housing around a frosted, pale green glass panel that diffuses light. The top of the fixture is adorned with a hexagonal ring and two pointed finials, adding a touch of gothic or fantasy-inspired flair. The main body tapers downward, ending in a small, pointed finial at the base, while the upper section is capped with a sloped, faceted metal roof. The glass panel is set within a thick, black metal border, and the overall silhouette is symmetrical and bold. The mounting bracket is integrated into the top, suggesting secure attachment to a vertical surface. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for illuminating urban exteriors with a distinctive, stylized presence.
description: A dark metal sconce with angular, geometric lines and a frosted green glass panel, featuring pointed finials and a hexagonal ring at the top. The design is bold and decorative, blending gothic and fantasy influences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent frosted green glass panel, hexagonal ring, and pointed finials.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sconce, the sloped metal roof, and the mounting bracket.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, with the glass panel and finials visible but less detail on the mounting bracket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the symmetry of the design and the thickness of the metal frame.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a gothic-inspired, geometric design with angular lines, pointed finials, and a bold silhouette. The combination of dark metal and frosted glass gives it a fantasy or medieval aesthetic.
